name: Scott Larson Construction
tagline: A second-generation Santa Rosa builder with skilled crews and fair pricing.
seoDescription: Scott Larson Construction is a CSLB-licensed, second-generation general contractor in Santa Rosa — custom building, remodels, additions, and flooring across

sections.heading: A second-generation Santa Rosa builder
sections.subheading: Scott Larson Construction brings skilled, licensed crews and honest pricing to custom homes, remodels, and additions across Sonoma County — the kind of contractor neighbors actually recommend.
badges: BuildZoom score of 98 — top 16% of California

sections.heading: Built by people who do the work
body: Scott Larson Construction is a second-generation general contractor based in Santa Rosa, serving homeowners throughout Sonoma County. Scott runs licensed, skilled crews and is known locally for doing quality work at reasonable prices — the reason so much of the business comes by word of mouth.

From custom homes and whole-home remodels to room additions, renovations, and flooring, the company holds a CSLB General Building license along with renovation and flooring classifications. An independent BuildZoom score of 98 places Scott Larson Construction in the top 16% of California licensed contractors.
highlights: CSLB-licensed General Building contractor — licensed & insured
BuildZoom score of 98 — top 16% of California contractors
Custom building, remodels, additions, renovation & flooring

items.description: Ground-up residential construction managed by an owner who's on the job, not just on the paperwork.

items.title: Whole-Home Remodels
items.description: Thoughtful remodels that respect what works in your home and rebuild what doesn't.

items.title: Room Additions
items.description: Additions that add real, livable space and blend seamlessly with the existing house.

items.title: Renovations
items.description: Renovation work that brings older Sonoma County homes up to today's standards.

items.title: Flooring & Floor Covering
items.description: Flooring and floor-covering installation as a licensed specialty, not a subbed afterthought.

items.title: Repairs & Improvements
items.description: Smaller projects handled with the same skilled crews and fair pricing as the big ones.

items.quote: Scott Larson is a great contractor. He does great work at reasonable prices, his workers are skilled, and he's fully licensed and insured.
items.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

sections.heading: Work with Scott Larson Construction
sections.body: Find us at Santa Rosa, CA. Call (707) 526-6899 — we’re glad to help.
